## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and PSEO initiatives for Airbyte Flex launch](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kyle Gaudreau is stepping in to replace Daryl, who is leaving for another opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Focus on new editorial content and PSEO pages for Airbyte Flex launch, with emphasis on industry-specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Content strategy includes core differentiation, competitive displacement, industry-specific, and technical topics](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Need to refine image generation process for industry pages and review proposed page structures](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes and Introductions

  - [Daryl is leaving for another opportunity; Kyle Gaudreau stepping back in](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Kyle previously led delivery side and helped build onboarding processes](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Continuity maintained with Kyle, Carrie, and Jacob staying on](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

### Content Strategy for Airbyte Flex

  - [New editorial content focused on Airbyte Flex launch](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Content mix: \~50% core differentiation, competitive displacement, industry-specific, and technical topics](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Emphasis on industry pages and PSEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Editorial content to be reviewed by Airbyte team before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Timeline and volume of articles to be determined](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)

### PSEO and Industry Pages

  - [Proposed structure for industry pages shared and discussed](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Need for Airbyte team to review content, identify gaps, and suggest improvements](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Discussion on image generation for industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Tanmay to provide list of industries based on Airbyte's data (100-200 list)](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
  - [Plan to link relevant connectors and "how to sync" pages within industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

### Content Workflow and Tools

  - [Project tracker set up to manage various initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Discussion on using tools like Whimsical for visualizing page structure](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Consideration of balancing custom vs. templated approaches for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Need to address image generation process for industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Discussion on taxonomy and database structure for connectors and industries](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic content generation and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tanmay and Mario to review proposed industry page structure and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Carrie to develop V1 strategy for Airbyte Flex editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Jacob to compile list of industries for PSEO pages](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=2020.0)
  - [GrowthX team to iterate on page templates based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Tanmay to provide GSC access to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [Continue parallel development of editorial and PSEO initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/qGuh6AixfoWwYk5zzjDwkr7UvNkfXS_J?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
